issue_title: Applied filters and splits keeping state after switching to a new data cube
issue_body_preview:
v 1.24

After a filter and split is applied to a data cube, when switching to a different data cube, that same filter and split is applied to the data cube switched to. Very powerful when this type of behavior is needed and when data cubes have common dimensions. Also saves time to prevent user fr
test_description_zh: 在一个数据立方体（data cube）上应用筛选条件（filter）和拆分（split），然后切换到另一个数据立方体，观察新数据立方体的筛选条件和拆分状态。
expected_result_zh: 切换到新的数据立方体后，之前在旧数据立方体上应用的筛选条件和拆分不应被保留/携带到新的数据立方体上，新数据立方体应以默认的初始状态（无额外筛选和拆分）加载显示。
